spec_match.rationale: Nine cards in visual order != DOM order with reading-flow toggling tab/AT traversal.

interactive.rationale: The toggle now updates a live current-tab-order readout and the focus trace records card traversal.

edge_cases.rationale: Single layout remains, but the page now shows the live DOM-vs-visual order comparison beside the focus trace.

references.rationale: The page now includes a see-also section with the ChromeStatus feature 5113638848561152 and sibling reading-flow concepts.

design_system.rationale: Support status colors use token-backed classes; raw hex scan was clean.

summary: Clear visual demo with tokenized support status and a live current-tab-order readout. Chrome DevTools MCP verified the toggle, readout, and focus trace with a clean console.
